# 01-Get all project types [GET]

`GET /rest/api/3/project/type`

Returns all [project types](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/Var1Nw), whether or not the instance has a valid license for each type.

This operation can be accessed anonymously.

**[Permissions](#permissions) required:** None.

### Responses

#### 200 - Returned if the request is successful.

Example (application/json):
```json
"[{\"color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"descriptionI18nKey\":\"jira.project.type.business.description\",\"formattedKey\":\"Business\",\"icon\":\"\",\"key\":\"business\"},{\"color\":\"#AAAAAA\",\"descriptionI18nKey\":\"jira.project.type.software.description\",\"formattedKey\":\"Software\",\"icon\":\"\",\"key\":\"software\"}]"
```

#### 401 - Returned if the authentication credentials are incorrect.
